introSection: Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Botton's Pleasure Beach in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Figure-eight shaped layout. The track passes though a fibreglass apple twice.

fullText:
Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Botton's Pleasure Beach in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK.

Figure-eight shaped layout. The track passes though a fibreglass apple twice.

Red track and yellow supports.
